title: anthemis cretica subsp. messanensis
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. messanensis, also known as Calabrian chamomile, is a subspecies of the Anthemis cretica plant, a type of daisy-like flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and soothing effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Calabrian chamomile include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia, digestive issues, and menstrual cramps. Calabrian chamomile is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to reap its therapeutic benefits.
